Systematic crypto signals
Investing in Crypto shouldn't feel like gambling.
Why should you start investing?

Inflation eats your savings

Cash sitting still quietly loses purchasing power every year. Investing is how you stop your savings from shrinking in real terms.

Why crypto over traditional assets?

BTC outperforms stocks & gold

Over the past decade, BTC has outperformed both the S&P 500 and gold by a wide margin — the tradeoff is volatility, which is exactly what a strategy is built to manage.

Why use a strategy, not blind buy-and-hold?

Strategy beats buy-and-hold

Stepping to cash before the worst drawdowns protects capital, lets gains compound faster, and gives a meaningfully better risk-to-reward than holding through every crash.

Volatility comes and goes like waves, learn to ride it

Let's start surfing →
Not financial advice. VolSurfers is a tool for following a defined, rules-based strategy — not a promise of returns. Cryptocurrencies are highly volatile; only invest what you can afford to lose, and do your own research before acting on any signal.

Signal logic (Alpha baseline, VW cloud, EMD trend, robust-scaled DEMA, MAD-RSI, ADX filter) is your actual Pine Script rules, run in JS against real INDEX:BTCUSD daily history.
Short signals are mapped to CASH (flat), not real shorts. The indicator translation is a close approximation of Pine's built-ins, not byte-for-byte identical — treat numbers as directional, not exact.
